items.title: Spot Prices Wrap: Northeast Natural Gas Rally Offsets Permian Plunge to New 2026 Lows
items.summary: Natural gas cash prices were mixed Wednesday as sharp gains across the Northeast and Appalachia countered Permian Basin prices sinking deeper into negative territory.

items.title: Futures Settle: Iran War Risks, Production Dip Lift Natural Gas Futures
items.summary: A record global oil reserve release failed to cool surging crude prices Wednesday, and natural gas futures rode the wave higher, reclaiming losses from earlier in the week even as domestic fundamentals pointed toward a loose shoulder season.

items.title: Fuel Switching, Industrial Cuts Poised to Push Asian LNG Demand Far Lower if War Continues
items.summary: The scramble for LNG supply in Asia is poised to get much worse in the months ahead if war in the Middle East continues.

items.title: MidDay Snapshot: Spot Gas Prices Rise as Colder Weather Boosts East, Midwest Heating Demand
items.summary: Spot gas prices were mostly higher for Thursday delivery as forecasts signaled a return to colder weather across major natural gas-consuming regions.

items.title: Europe Could Again Cap Natural Gas Prices as Energy Crisis Spirals
items.summary: The European Union (EU) is again considering a natural gas price cap as the world confronts another energy crisis that has knocked out more than 20% of global LNG production capacity.

items.title: EIA Says Natural Gas to Retain Market Share in Electric Generation as Demand Grows
items.summary: Demand for natural gas to fuel electric generation could grow as the hydrocarbon maintains its share of the energy mix and the overall pie increases in size.

items.title: MidDay Futures: Iran War Oil Surge Offers Support to Natural Gas Futures
items.summary: April Nymex natural gas futures climbed through midday Wednesday, lifted by a surge in crude oil prices tied to the Iran war, though weak domestic fundamentals limited the upside.

items.title: Midmorning Markets: Natural Gas Spot Prices Poised for Demand-Driven Boost
items.summary: After a mild start to March, demand for natural gas on the spot market could rise late this week as a cold front canvasses portions of the Rockies, Upper Midwest, Great Lakes and Northeast.

items.title: Northern California and Western Canada Natural Gas Prices Sagging in Tandem
items.summary: A winter of stagnant demand and an unusual surge in hydropower coupled with ample production has left Western Canadian and Northern Californian natural gas prices locked in a downward spiral.

items.title: Pennsylvania Natural Gas Production Grows at Strongest Rate in Years
items.summary: Pennsylvania’s natural gas production grew at its strongest rate since 2021 last year as prices firmed significantly and more unconventional wells were drilled, according to the state’s Independent Fiscal Office (IFO).

items.title: Iran Warns Oil Could Hit $200 per Barrel as Hormuz Threat Escalates
items.summary: Oil markets are bracing for an even bigger potential price shock with Iran on Wednesday warning that crude could surge to $200 per barrel if the war involving the U.S. and Israel continues to destabilize the Middle East’s energy corridors. Ebrahim Zo

items.title: Aramco Asks Asian Buyers for Dual Red Sea-Hormuz Oil Supply Plans
items.summary: Saudi Arabia’s oil giant Aramco is requesting from Asian buyers to nominate crude loading plans for April for both its key export port in the Gulf and the export alternative on the Red Sea, multiple sources told Reuters on Wednesday. The crisis at th

items.title: Iranian Drone Strike Hits Oman’s Largest Oil Storage Facility
items.summary: Iranian drones struck oil storage facilities at the Port of Salalah in Oman on Wednesday, marking the latest attack on Gulf energy infrastructure as the regional war expands into a full-scale confrontation over global oil supply. Fuel storage tanks a

items.title: IEA Launches Record 400-Million-Barrel Emergency Oil Release
items.summary: The International Energy Agency (IEA) and its member nations have agreed to release a record 400 million barrels of oil from strategic reserves in an attempt to stabilize global energy markets as the war involving Iran continues to disrupt crude flow

items.title: Oil Prices Surge Despite Record-Breaking Strategic Reserve Release
items.summary: Oil prices climbed sharply on Wednesday even after the International Energy Agency announced the largest coordinated release of strategic oil reserves in its history, underscoring the scale of supply concerns stemming from escalating tensions in the
